channel.title: Developer Certifications on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Developer Certifications on simeononsecurity

item.title: Developer Certifications Worth Getting in 2026
item.category: "developer certifications" , "best certifications for software developers" , "AWS certification for developers" , "Google Cloud developer certification" , "DevOps certifications" , "security certifications for developers" , "Kubernetes certification" , "developer certifications worth it 2026"
item.description: Which certifications are actually worth pursuing for software developers in 2026 — cloud, security, DevOps, and specialty credentials that open real career doors.

item.title: Software Development Career Playbook: From First Commit to Engineering Lead
item.category: "software development career" , "software engineering" , "career playbook" , "programming" , "developer career" , "career guidance" , "professional development"
item.description: A comprehensive guide to launching, growing, and leading a software development career. Covers programming languages, education paths, job searching, career advancement, and engineering leadership.

item.title: Education and Certifications for Software Developers
item.category: "software developer education" , "coding bootcamp vs degree" , "developer certifications" , "computer science degree" , "self-taught developer"
item.description: Compare degrees, bootcamps, self-teaching, and developer certifications to find the education path that fits your goals and budget.
